title: Control access and strictly limit user privileges
summary: Ranked first, the problem of access control failure is the biggest threat to the modern web. The impact is that unauthorized information is revealed or data is falsified.
cadence: Diperiksa setiap rilis atau perubahan hak akses
focus: By default, nish access to app functionality unless set public.
Implement access control once (centralized) and reuse it.
Log all access control failures.
evidence: Evidence of failed horizontal/vertical access (BOLA/IDOR).
Check the default-deny policy on the gateway router.
Evidence of warning logs when access bypass attempts occur.
analogy: Like the guard post officers who don't check the identity cards of anyone who enters.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Control access and strictly limit user privileges'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) and MFA (Multi-Factor Authentication) to support 'Control access and strictly limit user privileges'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Control access and strictly limit user privileges'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Use strong cryptography to protect sensitive data
summary: Cryptographic errors include failure to secure sensitive data both at rest and in transit, such as passwords, credit card numbers, or medical records.
focus: Classify the data the application processes or stores (Sensitive/Public).
Don't use outdated algorithms like MD5 or SHA1.
Use authentic and encrypted connections such as TLS.
evidence: Unencrypted traffic captures credentials.
Using a weak hash function can be hacked.
Use of default keys or weak keys.
reporting: Temuan audit standar enkripsi data perusahaan
analogy: Like sending a state secret letter using an open postcard.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Use strong cryptography to protect sensitive data'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Ensure encryption (AES-256) is running when data is at-rest & in-transit to 'Use strong cryptography to protect sensitive data'. Schedule regular backups.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Use strong cryptography to protect sensitive data'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Separate data (payload) with command logic
summary: Injections including SQL, NoSQL, OS command, and LDAP injection, can occur when untrusted data is sent to the interpreter as part of a query.
focus: Use secure APIs that avoid interpreters entirely or provide parameterized interfaces.
Implement positive or allow-list server-side input validation.
Escape vulnerable characters specific to the intended interpreter.
evidence: Ability to execute payload in search box input (SQLi).
Executing OS Code via parameters.
Review WAF logs that block injection attempts.
reporting: Temuan krusial dalam laporan Vulnerability Assessment.
analogy: A blind translator who simply relays deadly orders from a stranger to a general.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Separate data (payload) with command logic'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Ensure encryption (AES-256) is running when data is at-rest & in-transit to 'Separate data (payload) with command logic'. Schedule regular backups.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Separate data (payload) with command logic'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Implement protection from the early phases of security architecture design
summary: This new category focuses on design defects. 'Shift Left' and the application of threat modeling are needed to find vulnerabilities in the design and logical architecture phases.
focus: Perform threat modeling for technology procurement or new system design.
Use safe design patterns and tested reference components.
Separate layers based on trust and network segmentation.
evidence: There is no design risk analysis document (Risk Profile).
Architecture diagram that does not show security layers.
The architecture review shows a single point of security failure.
reporting: Termasuk dalam approval design readiness perusahaan
analogy: Build a safe but place the lock on the inside of the glass room.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Implement protection from the earliest phases of security architecture design'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Implement protection from the initial phase of security architecture design'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document to 'Implement protection from the early phases of security architecture design'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Avoid configuration errors with system hardening and automation
summary: Occurs when security controls are not configured securely, or on default installations. Occurs at any level from platform, application, to framework.
focus: Automate the installation process with a hardened environment.
Remove or do not install unnecessary features/frameworks/features.
Update and secure CORS configuration, Headers and server logs.
evidence: Directory display (directory listing) is active.
The default error page displays the complete stack trace.
The default admin access password has not been changed.
analogy: Leaving important documents in the drawer without locking it even though the drawer has a good lock.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Avoid misconfiguration with system hardening and automation'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Avoid misconfiguration with system hardening and automation'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Avoid misconfiguration with system hardening and automation'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Manage patch lifecycle and monitoring of vulnerable components
summary: Components such as libraries, frameworks, or other launch dependencies can have severe vulnerabilities that often consume the entire system if compromised.
cadence: Otomatis menggunakan SCA Scanning pada SDLC
focus: Maintain software bill of materials (SBOM).
Monitor new component versions or CVEs regularly.
Remove unused dependencies.
evidence: The system loads an outdated version of jQuery or Log4J with an active CVE.
The OS has not been patched for a year.
Use of the library is no longer supported by the vendor.
analogy: Patched the ship's leak but left the foundation hole under the deck to rot.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Manage patch lifecycle and monitoring of vulnerable components'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Manage patch life cycle and monitoring vulnerable components'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Manage patch lifecycle and monitoring of vulnerable components'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Verify and protect user session management credentials
summary: Authentication failures can allow attackers to compromise passwords, keys or session tokens and temporarily/permanently use another user's identity.
cadence: Sistem rilis otentikasi baru, Penetration Testing rutin
focus: Implement MFA (Multi-Factor Authentication).
Use appropriate password length & complexity policies.
Invalidate session IDs on the server after the user logs out.
evidence: Vulnerable authentication bypass using brute force.
The session token is exposed in the url (URL rewrite).
The application allows the password '123456'.
reporting: Sering menjadi root cause take-over account (ATO).
analogy: Keeping a house with a key is complicated, but it's easy to provide a duplicate key if someone else pretends to have lost the key.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Verify and protect user session management credentials'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Verify and protect user session management credentials'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Verify and protect user session management credentials'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Ensure code integrity, updates, and CI/CD pipelines
summary: Focuses on making assumptions without verifying the validity of the software. Applications that depend on outdated/unverified modules are vulnerable to supply chain attacks.
focus: Verify the integrity of downloaded modules (e.g. by checksum/hash).
Use a secure and internally monitored package repository/registry.
Review CI/CD processes to guarantee that modules are not modified by attackers.
evidence: Auto-update updates do not have digital signature validation.
Objects serialized without verification give rise to remote code execution (Insecure Deserialization).
3rd-party CDN integration which is vulnerable to being injected by attackers.
reporting: Berdampak pada keseluruhan kepercayaan publik atas perangkat lunak/layanan.
analogy: Blindly accepting a package of goods even though the stamp has been torn and re-taped by an unknown person.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Ensure code integrity, updates and CI/CD pipeline'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Ensure code integrity, updates and CI/CD pipeline'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents to 'Ensure code integrity, updates and CI/CD pipeline'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Maintain system visibility through comprehensive security logs
summary: Without logging and monitoring, data breaches are impossible to detect. Most breaches take ~200 days to be detected, usually from third parties.
focus: Log login failures and access failures for anomaly detection.
Ensure the log format is clear and parsable in the central SIEM log management.
Set alert responses based on threat activity thresholds.
evidence: Brute-force attacks went 12 hours without warning alarms.
The log does not include the user ID of the manipulative transaction.
Application logs are only stored locally and can be modified by attackers.
reporting: Dituangkan pada laporan insiden dan respons waktu penanganan.
analogy: Buildings with expensive safes but don't install CCTV cameras and heat detection systems.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Maintain system visibility via comprehensive security logs'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Enable centralized logging (SIEM) and automatic anomaly alerts regarding 'Maintain system visibility via complete security logs'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Maintain system visibility via complete security logs'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Disciplined server interface request fetch functionality
summary: The SSRF flaw occurs when a web application pulls a remote resource without validating the user's supply URI, causing the server to read internal connections behind the scenes.
scoring: Risiko Menengah ke Tinggi pada infrastruktur Cloud
focus: Isolate resource fetching functions in a separate network to reduce impact.
Use a deny-by-default policy for intranet/local URL access (e.g. 169.254.169.254 AWS metadata).
Disable implicit client redirection in the HTTP library.
evidence: The PDF export service can be used to download the /etc/passwd file on the host's local server.
An internal bot retrieves AWS metadata tokens from cloud instances.
The injection payload triggers a call to the bank's internal private IP.
analogy: Like a personal bodyguard who is told by his boss to call a strange number without knowing that the number can activate charges on the bodyguard's account.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Disciplining server interface request fetch functionality'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Disciplined server interface request fetch functionality'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Disciplining server interface request fetch functionality'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.
